case_title: BRUCE GEKKO et al VS. ANDY WONG

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, ANDY D.B.A. A.W. CONSTRUCTION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY GEKKO, BRUCE SOLI, JOHN ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, ANDY D.B.A. A.W. CONSTRUCTION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GEKKO, BRUCE SOLI, JOHN ERIC
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAN DEAN. FILED BY GEKKO, BRUCE SOLI, JOHN ERIC WONG, ANDY D.B.A. A.W. CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAN DEAN. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---GEORGE TSANG. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY OWNER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. PRO TEM JUDGE: DAN DEAN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEKKO, BRUCE SOLI, JOHN ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, ANDY D.B.A. A.W. CONSTRUCTION $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $535.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.
